examples: Division buddhist nun compares archness before love chases after cat and squirrel now already with them "peaceful coexistence."
The work shows every aspect of a cat's life, such as selfishness, archness, idleness and briskness, which show the artist's love of cat.
But there was a mixture of sweetness and archness in her manner which made it difficult for her to affront anybody; and darcy had never been so bewitched by any woman as he was by her.
Foremost among them is the inaptly cloying archness with which Vivian addresses the audience from start to finish ("It is not my intention to give away the plot, but I think I die at the end").
